messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: I need to request a refund for my recent purchase

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I'd be happy to help you with that. Can you tell me more about why you'd like a refund?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: The product doesn't work as advertised

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: I understand your frustration. Let me process a full refund for you.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Your refund has been initiated and will appear in 3-5 business days.
